cardiovascular.source: ACOG postpartum hypertension and cardiovascular follow-up guidance

tiering.critical: Severe-range BP or major cardiovascular diagnosis
tiering.high: Persistent postpartum hypertension or hypertensive disorder history

depression.source: ACOG perinatal mental health screening guidance

cardiac.source: ACOG PB 222 cardiovascular disease in pregnancy

tiers.Tier 2: Specialist follow-up or closer postpartum surveillance

patterns.IRON_DEFICIENCY_PATTERN: Low hemoglobin with microcytosis and low ferritin

vaccines.tdap: During each pregnancy, preferably weeks 27-36; postpartum catch-up if missed during pregnancy
vaccines.influenza: During pregnancy or postpartum when in season
vaccines.covid: Follow the current CDC updated schedule
